CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'Billing', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Canceled") ), Billing_Activation_Override_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Billing_Activation_Override_Stamp__c)), Billing_Activation_Override_Stamp__c, Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Activation_Override__c ) ), '' )
CustomField.label: Billing Activation Override
